Class MenuController

java.lang.Object
com.risk.controller.MenuController
public class MenuController extends Object
Handle event when user interact with the menu, pass it to Model

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(Model model, View view, Menu menu, MapController mapController)
      * Store reference of Model, View and MapController
      Parameters:
      model - is the reference of Model
      view - is the reference of View
      menu - game menu
      mapController - is the reference of the MapController

    • switchToStartGameMenu

      public void switchToStartGameMenu()
      Switch to start game menu

    • switchToMapEditor

      public void switchToMapEditor()
      Switch to Map Editor Called when user clicks the map editor button

    • switchToQuitMenu

      public void switchToQuitMenu()
      Switch to quitGame menu Called when user click quitGame button on menu

    • startNewGame

      public void startNewGame()
      Called when users click StartNewGame Button

    • loadGame

      public void loadGame() throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
      Called when users click Load Saved Game
      Throws:
      IOException - exception
      ClassNotFoundException - exception

    • tournamentMode

      public void tournamentMode()
      Called when users click TournamentMode

      Select map for starting the new game Called when user clicked the select map button

      Delete a selected map in tournament mode

    • validateEnteredNumPlayer

      public void validateEnteredNumPlayer(String enteredPlayerNum)
      Pass user entered string into NumPlayerMenuView Update menu view to display the map number Ask Model to initiate Player relative info
      Parameters:
      enteredPlayerNum - is what user entered in the text field

      public void startGame()
      Called when user click the start button Create PhaseView, CountryViews Pass info to the Menu, Model, and MapController

      Called when user confirm the quitGame process by clicking yes button
